text: A Nintendo Character Manual from 1993 outlines that Mario is “always ready to pack up his bag of tools and head off into unknown worlds inhabited by unrecognizable denizens,” and that “Mario is Tolerant… He has seen too many things on his travels to be narrow-minded,” so for how memed-up and of dubious quality the cutscenes in Hotel Mario are, him acting like that is actually completely in line with Nintendo’s vision.
